---
title: "Streaming Data and Real-Time Analytics Review"
subtitle: "Event Time, Watermarks, Windows, State, Replay, Alerts, and Streaming Governance"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Event stream

Define event schema, event key, event time, processing time, source, and value semantics.

## Temporal correctness

Document event-time behavior, watermark assumptions, allowed lateness, triggers, and output modes.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
from datetime import datetime, timezone

event_time = datetime.fromisoformat("2026-05-01T10:00:02+00:00")
processing_time = datetime.fromisoformat("2026-05-01T10:00:05+00:00")
lateness_seconds = (processing_time - event_time).total_seconds()
print({"lateness_seconds": lateness_seconds})
```

## Stateful outputs

Preserve stateful aggregates, alert records, and serving table update policies.

## Appendix

Preserve topic registry, window definitions, watermarks, alert rules, governance checks, and replay assumptions.
